_publications._publicationTitle: Aberrant oscillatory activity in neurofibromatosis type 1: an EEG study of resting state and working memory.

_contextSnippet: This group difference in unadjusted theta phase coherence was significantly different (F(1,29) = 4.852, p = 0.036, ηp2 = 0.143)
details: Successfully computed theta phase coherence measures, detecting significant group differences in unadjusted frontoparietal theta phase coherence (F(1,29) = 4.852, p = 0.036, ηp2 = 0.143)
